Index.title: TarotNow Home
Index.tagline: Discover Your Destiny with TarotNow AI
Index.heroDesc: Experience the mystical art of Tarot combined with the deep analytical power of Artificial Intelligence. Unlock the answers hidden within your subconscious.
Index.featureDesc: The perfect blend of ancient spirituality and future technology brings deeply personalized experiences.
Index.f1Desc: Trained on tens of thousands of ancient Tarot texts, our AI provides accurate and personalized interpretations for your specific situation.
Index.f2Desc: Every draw is a chance to collect card elements. Accumulate enough elements to upgrade your cards with more glorious and powerful appearances.
Index.f3Desc: Our Deterministic Shuffle algorithm uses Hashing technology to ensure the drawn cards are the unique, unaltered result of that exact moment.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your details and fine-tune your connection.

validation.display_name_min: Display name must be at least 2 characters

mfa.title: Two-factor security
mfa.subtitle: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/TOTP) protects your account from unauthorized access. Required for payouts.
mfa.enabled_desc: Your account is protected with MFA.
mfa.disabled_desc: Enable MFA to protect your wallet and withdraw.
mfa.step1_desc: Use Google Authenticator, Authy or any TOTP app.
mfa.step2_desc: If you lose your device, you must use these codes to recover. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.step3_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to finish setup.

reader.price_help: The main question fee is charged via Escrow.

AiInterpretation.title: Universal Interpretation
AiInterpretation.subtitle: AI is analyzing the cards and connecting with your energy
AiInterpretation.error_stream: The communication channel is disrupted. Please try again later.
AiInterpretation.follow_up_placeholder: What else would you like to ask about this reading?...
AiInterpretation.follow_up_hint: Max 5 follow-up questions. Uses AI quota; free Diamonds if your cards are high enough level.
AiInterpretation.hard_cap_desc: This session has reached its energy limit (5/5 questions). Too many distractions can distort the original message. Take what you've received and reflect on it.

Common.app_description: A transparent and modern Tarot experience.

c0.name: The Fool
c0.meaning: A new beginning full of potential, stepping into adventure with an open and free spirit.

c1.name: The Magician
c1.meaning: Use your talents and resources to turn ideas into reality.

c2.name: The High Priestess
c2.meaning: Listen to your inner voice, trust your intuition, and honor inner wisdom.

c3.name: The Empress
c3.meaning: A season of abundance, creativity, and a deep connection with nature.

c4.name: The Emperor
c4.meaning: Strong leadership, discipline, and building a solid foundation.

c5.name: The Hierophant
c5.meaning: Seek spiritual guidance, follow tradition, and honor shared values.

c6.name: The Lovers
c6.meaning: A deep bond, an important choice, and harmony in relationships.

c7.name: The Chariot
c7.meaning: Overcome obstacles through strong will and focused determination.

c8.name: Strength
c8.meaning: True strength comes from within: courage, patience, and compassion.

c9.name: The Hermit
c9.meaning: A quiet time for reflection, seeking answers from within.

c10.name: Wheel of Fortune
c10.meaning: Positive change, good luck arriving, and the turning cycles of life.

c11.name: Justice
c11.meaning: Truth is revealed, fairness is served, and responsibility is required.

c12.name: The Hanged Man
c12.meaning: Pause to see things from a different perspective and surrender what no longer serves.

c13.name: Death
c13.meaning: An ending that opens a new beginning, a profound transformation.

c14.name: Temperance
c14.meaning: Seek balance, practice patience, and harmonize opposing forces.

c15.name: The Devil
c15.meaning: Being bound by temptation, unhealthy habits, or fear.

c16.name: The Tower
c16.meaning: Sudden upheaval breaks what no longer fits, clearing the way to rebuild.

c17.name: The Star
c17.meaning: Renewed hope, healing, and creative inspiration.

c18.name: The Moon
c18.meaning: Confront fear, illusion, and what is hidden in the subconscious.

c19.name: The Sun
c19.meaning: Radiant joy, success, and uplifting optimism.

c20.name: Judgement
c20.meaning: A time to review and awaken, stepping into a new chapter.

c21.name: The World
c21.meaning: Completion of a major cycle, bringing wholeness and fulfillment.

c22.name: Ace of Wands
c22.meaning: Fresh creative energy, an inspired new start.

c23.name: Two of Wands
c23.meaning: Look ahead and plan your next steps.

c24.name: Three of Wands
c24.meaning: Expand your vision and embrace new opportunities.

c25.name: Four of Wands
c25.meaning: Celebrate achievements and enjoy harmony at home.

c26.name: Five of Wands
c26.meaning: Healthy competition or facing a challenge.

c27.name: Six of Wands
c27.meaning: Victory and recognition for your success.

c28.name: Seven of Wands
c28.meaning: Stand your ground through tests and defend your position.

c29.name: Eight of Wands
c29.meaning: Things move quickly, calling for swift action.

c30.name: Nine of Wands
c30.meaning: Persevere even when tired, preparing for the final challenge.

c31.name: Ten of Wands
c31.meaning: Carrying too much responsibility, learning to delegate.

c32.name: Page of Wands
c32.meaning: Explore the world with enthusiasm and curiosity.

c35.name: King of Wands
c35.meaning: Leadership through vision and seasoned experience.

c36.name: Ace of Cups
c36.meaning: A blossoming new love or overflowing creative inspiration.

c37.name: Two of Cups
c37.meaning: A harmonious bond and an ideal partnership.

c38.name: Three of Cups
c38.meaning: Joy shared with friends and community.

c39.name: Four of Cups
c39.meaning: Dissatisfied with the present and missing an opportunity.

c40.name: Five of Cups
c40.meaning: Grieving a loss, while remembering what still remains.

c41.name: Six of Cups
c41.meaning: Nostalgic memories, innocence, and simple sweetness.

c42.name: Seven of Cups
c42.meaning: Many tempting choices, but discernment is needed.

c43.name: Eight of Cups
c43.meaning: Walking away from a situation that no longer has meaning.

c44.name: Nine of Cups
c44.meaning: Wishes coming true and deep satisfaction.

c45.name: Ten of Cups
c45.meaning: Complete family happiness and emotional fulfillment.

c47.name: Knight of Cups
c47.meaning: Romance and following the heart's calling.

c48.name: Queen of Cups
c48.meaning: Deep empathy, strong intuition, and healing energy.

c50.name: Ace of Swords
c50.meaning: Mental clarity and a breakthrough idea.

c51.name: Two of Swords
c51.meaning: A difficult choice, staying calm to weigh options.

c53.name: Four of Swords
c53.meaning: Time to rest and recover your energy.

c54.name: Five of Swords
c54.meaning: Winning at any cost, often losing more than you gain.

c55.name: Six of Swords
c55.meaning: Leaving hardship behind to find calmer waters.

c56.name: Seven of Swords
c56.meaning: Stealthy action or using a clever strategy.

c57.name: Eight of Swords
c57.meaning: Feeling trapped by circumstances or your own mind.

c58.name: Nine of Swords
c58.meaning: Anxiety and fears that haunt, especially at night.

c59.name: Ten of Swords
c59.meaning: A painful, sudden ending that can lead to a new beginning.

c60.name: Page of Swords
c60.meaning: Curious, intelligent, and always ready to learn.

c61.name: Knight of Swords
c61.meaning: Fast, decisive action driven by ambition.

c62.name: Queen of Swords
c62.meaning: Sharp intellect, independence, and uncompromising honesty.

c63.name: King of Swords
c63.meaning: Leadership through wisdom, fairness, and logic.

c64.name: Ace of Pentacles
c64.meaning: A new financial opportunity and a solid foundation for the future.

c66.name: Three of Pentacles
c66.meaning: Effective collaboration and developing your craft.

c67.name: Four of Pentacles
c67.meaning: Protecting resources and seeking financial stability.

c68.name: Five of Pentacles
c68.meaning: A challenging period financially or spiritually.

c69.name: Six of Pentacles

c70.name: Seven of Pentacles
c70.meaning: Patience while waiting for long-term investments to pay off.

c71.name: Eight of Pentacles
c71.meaning: Working diligently to refine and master skills.

c72.name: Nine of Pentacles
c72.meaning: Prosperity and enjoying the fruits of your labor.

c73.name: Ten of Pentacles
c73.meaning: A stable legacy and multi-generational security.

c74.name: Page of Pentacles
c74.meaning: An opportunity to learn and grow financially.

c75.name: Knight of Pentacles

c76.name: Queen of Pentacles
c76.meaning: Creating safety and nurturing through practicality.

c77.name: King of Pentacles

Legal.tos_meta_desc: Terms of service and usage for TarotNow.
Legal.ai_disclaimer_meta_desc: Liability disclaimer for AI-generated information from TarotNow.

tos.section1_body: Welcome to TarotNow. By using our service, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. Our service provides entertainment and supportive guidance for reference purposes through Tarot cards and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology.
tos.section2_body: All Tarot interpretation content is generated by AI and is for entertainment and reference only. We are not legally responsible for personal, medical, financial, or legal decisions made based on TarotNow results.
tos.section3_body: Users are responsible for keeping their account information secure. Diamond top-up transactions are non-refundable except in cases of system errors caused by the payment gateway.

privacy.section1_body: TarotNow respects your privacy. We collect necessary information such as email address, display name, and date of birth to personalize your Tarot reading experience and to calculate zodiac signs and numerology.
privacy.section2_body: Your data is used internally to store reading history. AI query history is encrypted and sent to the provider (OpenAI) to obtain results and is not used for AI training, in line with the partner's commitment.
privacy.section3_body: All account information and passwords are securely encrypted. We do not sell, exchange, or share users' personal data with third parties for commercial purposes.

ai_disclaimer.warning: Notice: Predictions and analyses from Astral AI are generated entirely by large language models (LLMs). Please do not treat this as a substitute for medical, psychological, or financial professional advice.
ai_disclaimer.section1_body: All Tarot messages are interpreted through Artificial Intelligence (AI). Although we optimize mystical logic and Tarot intuition, AI interpretations may not be 100% accurate in all cases and contexts.
ai_disclaimer.section2_body: Results related to emotions, health, or money must not be used for self-diagnosis or as a replacement for legal/financial advice. Always consult a real-life professional if you are facing serious issues.
ai_disclaimer.consent_note: You must agree to this awareness statement before registering a TarotNow account.
